title: Arts. 1210 to 1219 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
SECTION 8--OF THE APPOINTMENT OF COUNSEL OF ABSENT

HEIRS, AND OF THEIR DUTIES

Art. 1210.  Arts. 1210 to 1219 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
